2603.30035.title: Reward-Based Online LLM Routing via NeuralUCB
2603.30035.paper_summary: This study investigates the use of NeuralUCB for cost-aware large language model (LLM) routing. Existing routing approaches can be broadly grouped into supervised routing methods and partial-feedback methods, each with different tradeoffs in efficiency and adaptivity. We implement a NeuralUCB-based routing policy and evaluate it on RouterBench under a simulated online setting. Experimental results show that the proposed method consistently outperforms random and min-cost baselines in utility reward. Compared with the max-quality reference, our method achieves substantially lower inference cost while maintaining competitive reward. These findings suggest that NeuralUCB is a promising approach for cost-aware LLM routing, while also highlighting remaining challenges in action discrimination and exploration.
2603.30035.paper_summary_zh: 這項研究探討了在成本意識下使用 NeuralUCB 進行大型語言模型 (LLM) 路由的情況。現有的路由方法大致可以分為監督式路由方法和部分反饋方法，這兩者在效率和適應性上各有不同的權衡。我們實現了一種基於 NeuralUCB 的路由策略，並在模擬的在線環境下對其進行了 RouterBench 的評估。實驗結果顯示，所提出的方法在效用獎勵方面始終優於隨機和最小成本基準。與最大質量參考相比，我們的方法在保持競爭性獎勵的同時，實現了顯著較低的推理成本。這些發現表明，NeuralUCB 是一種有前景的成本意識 LLM 路由方法，同時也突顯了在行動區分和探索方面仍然存在的挑戰。
2603.30035.author: Ming-Hua Tsai et.al.
